staticChecks.evidence: Reader controls define accessibility identifiers and labels in Views.swift.
Reader uses accessibilityReduceMotion and reduced-motion pathways.
Compose reader and library surfaces use semantic labels/content descriptions where controls need them.
tools/validate_visual_layout.py checks fit-safe art dimensions and smoke screenshots.

realDeviceChecksRequiredBeforeSubmission: Dynamic type or font scaling behavior
Color contrast on primary reader/paywall/library controls
nonEvidenceWarning: This checklist is not a completed accessibility QA run.
